title: What will likely break this week
subtitle: Based on historical routing patterns, maintenance calendars, and anomaly recurrence.

events.title: UPI decline rate 4× higher during scheduled maintenance
events.detail: NPCI has published a maintenance window covering HDFC, ICICI, and SBI UPI endpoints. Historical impact: success rate drops from 97% to 74% during this window.
actions: Pre-configured NetBanking fallback active on 5 of 6 UPI-first merchants
Urban Company is UPI-only — review routing policy before Sunday
Customer-facing copy ready: 'UPI is temporarily slow — try NetBanking?'

events.title: ICICI NetBanking weekly maintenance
events.detail: ICICI NetBanking is offline for 60 minutes every Tuesday for patching. Predictable, but unwaited merchants still fail here every week.
actions: All three have card fallback active
No action required — routing will handle

events.when: Mon, 28 Apr onwards · end of month
events.title: HDFC Visa decline spike · credit-limit refresh cycle
events.detail: Historical pattern: HDFC Visa decline rate jumps from 8% baseline to 24% in the last three days of each month as customers hit their credit limits. Rebounds after 1st of next month.

affected.merchant: All merchants with HDFC Visa traffic

actions: Routing policy: HDFC Visa → ICICI Visa → RuPay on decline — already active platform-wide
Expected recovery rate of blocked attempts: 68%
Consider customer copy: 'Your card was declined — try UPI for a faster payment'

events.title: SEPA Instant latency creeping up in EU window
events.detail: SEPA Instant median response time has risen from 4.2s to 6.1s over the last 10 days during EU business hours (13:30–18:30 IST). Not yet failure territory but trending wrong.
actions: If median crosses 10s, auto-switch to SEPA Standard (slower but reliable)

historicalMatch: This week's forecast is based on 18 months of routing data across 47 merchants. Predictions for last week proved accurate on 4 of 4 events.
